The team engaged in intra-operative planning followed by a verification RIO check.
The surgeon alternated between bone preparation on various surfaces and frequent RIO checks to verify alignment.
The team performed final intra-operative planning adjustments.
The surgical procedure was finalized and the system was set to finish.

The surgical procedure was finalized and the robotic system was set to finish.
